div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

p.b:
1. ユーザーが
WMS/TMS を開く
ログイン画面
1. The user opens the WMS/TMS.
Login screen

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

p.b:
2. カメラ認識画像/
動画をキャプチャ
2. Camera recognition captures images/videos.

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

p.b:
4. 顔認証サービス
Face Authentication Service
Who is this?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

p.b:
アクセス拒否
403
Access denied
403

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

p.b:
5. 認可サービス
Authorization Service
Can this user access
this system?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

p.b:
認可を返す
Return
authorized: true,
roles: ['warehouse_operator']

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

p.b:
6. トークンサービス
JWT Service

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

p.b:
JWT を生成
ユーザー情報を含む
ロール、システムを含む
etc.
Generates a JWT
Includes user information,roles, system information etc.

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

p.b:
7. ログイン成功
ダッシュボードへ
リダイレクト
Redirect to
WMS/TMS
Dashboard

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

p.b:
ログイン失敗
Login failure
